example_tasks: Create a matrix for vendor comparison
Map out the new database schema
Align project milestones in a grid
Design a modular layout for the website
Create a spreadsheet for inventory tracking
Set up a Kanban board structure
Define the grid system for the UI design
poor_matches: Send an email to the team
reasoning: The icon represents structure, grids, and organization. It is useful for tasks involving data arrangement, layout design, or systematic categorization, but it is too abstract for general task management.
